nodes.context: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in San Bernardino, California in 1961, with chapters across the US, primarily in New England.
Rival motorcycle club based in Wallingford, Connecticut.
Major outlaw motorcycle club, part of the 'Big Four', involved in a brawl with Diablos in 2019.

edges.context: Diablos member Raymond Stone confessed to involvement in the 1992 murder of James Gang MC member Mike D'Amato.
Diablos and Outlaws members were involved in a mass brawl at a bar in Plainville, Connecticut in May 2019.
